description: Homebrew packages installed on this machine. Run 'brew bundle' with the generated Brewfile to restore.

version_control.gh: GitHub CLI for managing PRs, issues, and repos from the terminal.
version_control.gitstatus: Fast git status for shell prompts, used by powerlevel10k.
version_control.libgit2: C library for git operations, used by tools that embed git support.

kubernetes_and_infra.argocd: GitOps continuous delivery tool for Kubernetes.
kubernetes_and_infra.consul: Service mesh and service discovery tool by HashiCorp.
kubernetes_and_infra.consul-k8s: Kubernetes-specific CLI and components for Consul.
kubernetes_and_infra.helm: Kubernetes package manager for deploying applications via charts.
kubernetes_and_infra.kubelogin: kubectl credential plugin for Azure AD and OIDC providers.
kubernetes_and_infra.kurtosis-cli: Environment orchestration tool for distributed system testing.
kubernetes_and_infra.nomad: HashiCorp workload orchestrator for containers and non-containerized apps.
kubernetes_and_infra.terraform: Infrastructure-as-code tool for provisioning cloud resources.
kubernetes_and_infra.tfswitch: CLI tool to switch between multiple Terraform versions.
kubernetes_and_infra.starport: Scaffold and launch Cosmos blockchain apps.

cloud_and_devops.azure-cli: Microsoft Azure command-line tool for managing cloud resources.
cloud_and_devops.copilot-cli: AWS Copilot CLI for deploying containerized apps on ECS.
cloud_and_devops.conftest: Policy testing tool for configuration files using OPA.
cloud_and_devops.opa: Open Policy Agent for unified policy enforcement.
cloud_and_devops.sonar-scanner: CLI scanner for SonarQube/SonarCloud code quality analysis.

languages_and_runtimes.go: Google's compiled language known for concurrency and simplicity.
languages_and_runtimes.node: JavaScript runtime built on V8 for server-side and tooling.
languages_and_runtimes.nvm: Node Version Manager for switching between Node.js versions.
languages_and_runtimes.rust: Systems programming language with memory safety and high performance.
languages_and_runtimes.luajit: Just-in-time compiler for Lua, used by Neovim plugins.
languages_and_runtimes.solidity: Smart contract programming language for Ethereum.

shell_and_terminal.bash: Updated Bash shell, newer than the outdated macOS system Bash.
shell_and_terminal.coreutils: GNU core utilities with consistent behavior on macOS.
shell_and_terminal.fzf: Fuzzy finder for the terminal; integrates with shell history and file search.
shell_and_terminal.gnu-sed: GNU sed stream editor, more feature-rich than macOS BSD sed.
shell_and_terminal.lsd: Modern replacement for ls with icons and color output.
shell_and_terminal.powerlevel10k: Fast and highly customizable Zsh prompt theme.
shell_and_terminal.tmux: Terminal multiplexer for managing multiple terminal sessions.
shell_and_terminal.tree: Display directory structures as a visual tree.
shell_and_terminal.yazi: Terminal file manager with image preview and async operations.
shell_and_terminal.zellij: Terminal workspace with tiling, tabs, and plugin support.
shell_and_terminal.zoxide: Smarter cd command that learns your most-visited directories.
shell_and_terminal.dialog: Create terminal dialog boxes and UI widgets from shell scripts.
shell_and_terminal.ttyd: Share terminal sessions over the web via a browser.
shell_and_terminal.shc: Shell script compiler that converts shell scripts to binary.

editors.neovim: Hyperextensible text editor, modernized fork of Vim.
editors.luv: Lua bindings for libuv, used by Neovim's async internals.
editors.lpeg: Parsing expression grammar library for Lua, used by Neovim.
editors.tree-sitter: Incremental parsing library for syntax highlighting in editors.
editors.unibilium: Terminal info library used by Neovim.

search_and_data.ripgrep: Extremely fast recursive grep tool written in Rust.
search_and_data.jq: Lightweight command-line JSON processor and formatter.
search_and_data.jid: Interactive JSON drill-down tool with fuzzy search.
search_and_data.visidata: Terminal spreadsheet and data exploration tool.

security_and_crypto.gnupg: GNU Privacy Guard for encrypting and signing data.
security_and_crypto.gpgme: Library for easy access to GnuPG crypto functions.
security_and_crypto.libgpg-error: Common error codes library shared by GnuPG components.
security_and_crypto.libksba: X.509 and CMS library used by GnuPG.
security_and_crypto.npth: New Portable Threads library used by gpg-agent.
security_and_crypto.pinentry: Secure passphrase dialog program used by GnuPG.
security_and_crypto.lastpass-cli: Command-line interface for accessing LastPass password vault.
security_and_crypto.nettle: Low-level cryptographic library used by GnuTLS.
security_and_crypto.p11-kit: PKCS#11 module loader and shared trust anchors.
security_and_crypto.ca-certificates: Mozilla's curated bundle of trusted root CA certificates.
security_and_crypto.nss: Network Security Services library for SSL/TLS.
security_and_crypto.nspr: Netscape Portable Runtime, platform abstraction used by NSS.
security_and_crypto.libtasn1: ASN.1 parsing library required by GnuTLS.
security_and_crypto.libsodium: Modern cryptographic library with a simple API.
security_and_crypto.pkcs11-helper: Helper library for working with PKCS#11 tokens.
security_and_crypto.unbound: Validating, recursive DNS resolver with DNSSEC support.
security_and_crypto.sshpass: Non-interactive SSH password provider for scripting.

networking.curl: Command-line tool for transferring data with URLs.
networking.c-ares: Asynchronous DNS resolver library used by curl and Node.js.
networking.libnghttp2: HTTP/2 C library used by curl.
networking.libssh2: C library for SSHv2 protocol, used by curl and git.
networking.libidn2: Updated IDN library implementing UTS#46 and RFC 5891.
networking.libevent: Event-driven network library for async I/O.
networking.libwebsockets: Lightweight C library for WebSocket client and server.
networking.rtmpdump: Toolkit for RTMP streaming media, used by ffmpeg.
networking.httrack: Website copier for mirroring websites locally.

databases.postgresql@14: Open-source relational database, pinned to version 14.
databases.redis: In-memory data structure store used as cache, queue, or database.

build_tools.cmake: Cross-platform build system generator for C/C++.
build_tools.pkgconf: Package configuration tool for finding installed libraries.
build_tools.maven: Java build and dependency management tool.
build_tools.yarn: Fast JavaScript package manager, alternative to npm.
build_tools.abseil: Google's C++ common libraries used by gRPC and Protobuf.

media_and_av.ffmpeg: Comprehensive multimedia framework for recording, converting, and streaming.
media_and_av.opus: Modern audio codec optimized for voice and music.
media_and_av.libvpx: VP8/VP9 video codec library from Google.
media_and_av.libass: Subtitle rendering library for ASS/SSA format.
media_and_av.frei0r: Minimalist plugin API for video effects.
media_and_av.sdl2: Cross-platform multimedia library for graphics, audio, and input.
media_and_av.sdl3: Latest generation SDL multimedia abstraction library.
media_and_av.sdl3_ttf: TrueType font rendering extension for SDL3.

image_processing.pillow: Python Imaging Library for image processing.
image_processing.libimagequant: Palette quantization library for reducing PNG color depth.
image_processing.libavif: Library for encoding and decoding AVIF images.
image_processing.highway: CPU-portable SIMD intrinsics library for fast processing.
image_processing.jpeg-xl: Next-generation image format with better compression than JPEG.
image_processing.giflib: Library for reading and writing GIF files.
image_processing.libsamplerate: High-quality audio sample rate conversion library.
image_processing.libpng: Reference library for reading and writing PNG files.
image_processing.libtiff: Library for reading and writing TIFF files.

fonts_and_text.fontconfig: Library for font configuration and customization.
fonts_and_text.harfbuzz: Text shaping engine for complex scripts and OpenType.
fonts_and_text.pango: Library for layout and rendering of internationalized text.
fonts_and_text.graphite2: Font rendering engine for complex non-Latin scripts.
fonts_and_text.libunibreak: Unicode line and word breaking library.
fonts_and_text.utf8proc: Library for processing UTF-8 Unicode strings.
fonts_and_text.oniguruma: Regular expression library supporting multiple encodings.
fonts_and_text.libunistring: GNU library for manipulating Unicode strings.

pdf_and_documents.poppler: PDF rendering library based on xpdf.
pdf_and_documents.jbig2dec: JBIG2 image compression decoder, used by Ghostscript.
pdf_and_documents.leptonica: Image processing library used by Tesseract OCR.
pdf_and_documents.tesseract: Open-source OCR engine for recognizing text in images.
pdf_and_documents.pandoc: Universal document converter between markup formats.
pdf_and_documents.imath: C++ math library for 2D/3D graphics, part of OpenEXR.
pdf_and_documents.openexr: High dynamic range image file format and library.
pdf_and_documents.little-cms2: Color management engine for ICC profile transformations.

compression.zstd: Fast real-time compression algorithm with excellent ratio.
compression.lzo: Fast data compression library focused on decompression speed.
compression.brotli: Google's compression algorithm optimized for web assets.

graphics_and_display.cairo: 2D graphics library with support for multiple output devices.
graphics_and_display.pixman: Low-level pixel manipulation library used by Cairo.
graphics_and_display.libxcb: C binding for the X11 protocol.
graphics_and_display.libxdmcp: X Display Manager Control Protocol library.
graphics_and_display.libxinerama: X11 Xinerama extension for multi-monitor support.
graphics_and_display.libxrandr: X11 RandR extension for screen resizing and rotation.
graphics_and_display.xorgproto: X.Org protocol headers for building X11 libraries.
graphics_and_display.freerdp: Free implementation of the Remote Desktop Protocol.
graphics_and_display.tcl-tk: Tcl scripting language with Tk GUI toolkit.

core_libraries.ncurses: Terminal control library for text-based UIs.
core_libraries.readline: GNU library for line-editing and history.
core_libraries.libyaml: C library for parsing and emitting YAML.
core_libraries.libuv: Asynchronous I/O library used by Node.js and Neovim.
core_libraries.libusb: Library for user-space access to USB devices.
core_libraries.json-c: JSON parsing library for C programs.
core_libraries.z3: High-performance theorem prover and SMT solver from Microsoft.
core_libraries.mpdecimal: Decimal floating-point arithmetic library, used by Python.

blockchain.sedge: One-click Ethereum node setup and management tool.

developer_tools.android-platform-tools: ADB and fastboot for interacting with Android devices.
developer_tools.codex: OpenAI's coding agent for AI-assisted development.
developer_tools.dotnet-sdk: Microsoft .NET SDK for building C# and F# applications.
developer_tools.fig: Terminal autocomplete and developer productivity layer.
developer_tools.gitkraken-cli: GitKraken's terminal Git client with visual graph output.
developer_tools.ghostty: Fast, native terminal emulator built for modern macOS.
developer_tools.redis-insight: GUI tool for visualizing and managing Redis data.
developer_tools.tailscale-app: Zero-config VPN using WireGuard for secure private networking.

fonts.font-agave-nerd-font: Agave monospace font patched with Nerd Font icons.
fonts.font-commit-mono-nerd-font: Commit Mono font patched with Nerd Font icons.
fonts.font-hack-nerd-font: Hack monospace font patched with Nerd Font icons.
fonts.mactex: Full MacTeX distribution for typesetting with LaTeX.

productivity.hiddenbar: Menu bar item hider to keep macOS menu bar clean.
productivity.keycastr: Keystroke visualizer for showing key presses during demos.
productivity.keyclu: Keyboard shortcut cheat-sheet overlay for macOS apps.
productivity.stats: System resource monitor in the macOS menu bar.
